title: SMW2 Yoshi's Island Obstacle Course on Mario Paint Composer
description:
Day 1:
#66 - Top Rated (Today) - Music

Day 2:

#99 - Most Discussed (Today) - Music
#80 - Top Favorites (Today) - Music
#40 - Top Rated (Today) - Music


A.k.a. Athletic Theme. It plays on stages such as Hop Hop Donut Lifts! Probably my favorite song from that game.

This was also remixed for Brawl.

This song uses SatoshiLyish's new soundset for Mario Paint Composer that has a cool echo effect for every note. I'm using Mario Paint Plus v1.1e. It's really cool. Check it out here:
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fcfM6yu379M

I've wanted to do this song for a while but it just never came out how I wanted to... until I tried it with the new soundset and I really liked the way it sounded. Hence this new piece is born. I hope you all like it and I really hope Youtube Doesn't rape the sound quality... again.

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker
